name: Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd.
summary: Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the property investment, development, and management businesses in the People's Republic of China. It develops villas, townhouses, residential and commercial buildings, and office buildings. The company is also involved in the hotel and catering, cinema, and department stores and cultural center operations, as well as waterway passenger and cargo transportation, healthcare business, property leasing, and manufacturing and trading of pharmaceutical products. In addition, it offers commerce management and construction engineering services. Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
